---
# Front-matter is empty but present so Jekyll processes this file
# through Liquid (in case we ever want to template the host) and
# copies it to the site root.
---
# milely.io — robots policy
#
# We're a marketing site for an iOS app. Everything here is meant to be
# indexed; we have no admin pages, no draft URLs, no /api/ path. The
# explicit allow-everything makes that intent unambiguous to crawlers
# that interpret missing rules as "don't crawl."

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap — generated by jekyll-sitemap at build time.
Sitemap: https://milely.io/sitemap.xml
